# Threshold Calibration Guide

## Purpose

Faithfulness threshold controls sensitivity between `faithful` and `hallucinated` verdicts.

## Calibration Process

1. Build a representative labeled dataset for your domain.
2. Run scorer over the dataset and store raw scores.
3. Evaluate precision/recall across candidate thresholds.
4. Select threshold based on risk posture and false-positive tolerance.

## Governance Controls

1. Runtime threshold values are bounded by `MIN_THRESHOLD` and `MAX_THRESHOLD`.
2. Defaults should be reviewed after each model update.
3. Production overrides should be tracked and approved.

## Recommended Starting Point

1. Start at `0.6` for general-purpose use.
2. Tighten toward `0.7-0.8` when false-faithful decisions are high-risk.
3. Loosen toward `0.5-0.6` when recall is prioritized.
